calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Matt Brekhus, Esq. for Plaintiff and Samlecia Gaye, Esq. for Defendant. The case is dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Sanctions imposed on May-14-2019 is vacated in open court. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by plaintiff; Samlecia Gaye, Esq. appearing for defendant. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-16-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
